name: char-a-programmer
desc: A 30-year-old Chinese male programmer named Li Wei. Tall and thin build, short black hair, wears rectangular black-framed glasses, wearing a blue-and-white plaid shirt over a gray t-shirt, dark jeans. Slightly hunched posture from long hours coding. Clean-shaven, sharp jawline. Full body portrait, white background. Japanese anime digital art style.

name: char-b-pm
desc: A 28-year-old Chinese male product manager named Wang Hao. Medium height, slightly chubby build, round face, no glasses, short black hair parted to the side, wearing a dark green polo shirt tucked into khaki pants, brown leather belt. Friendly smile, dimples. Full body portrait, white background. Japanese anime digital art style.

name: scene-office
desc: Modern Chinese startup office interior, daytime. A large whiteboard covered with product architecture diagrams and sticky notes on the left wall. A long shared desk with two computer monitors, coffee mugs, and scattered papers. Bright natural light from floor-to-ceiling windows. Minimalist decoration, some potted plants. A rolling whiteboard chair. Japanese anime digital art style, detailed background.
